title: Detect contradictions on staged-ingested source (mock spine step)
problem: ticket-146 proves build-relationships on staged-ingested sources. Operators cannot run detect-contradictions on that source with deterministic mock fixtures to continue the Phase 3 spine.
acceptance_criteria: After build-relationships on staged-ingested source, detect-contradictions with mock LLM persists validated support/qualification/contradiction edges or detection results (fixture-backed).
Unit test extends ticket-146 spine through detect-contradictions.
No live LLM in default pytest collection.
Golden tests remain mock-only and pass.
rollback_plan: Remove staged contradiction fixture/test; retain ticket-146 relationship spine.
